mapper.select: SELECT id, form_id, type, label, placeholder, required, order_num, options, validation, created_at, updated_at FROM form_fields WHERE form_id = #{formId} ORDER BY order_num
mapper.update: UPDATE form_fields SET label = #{label}, placeholder = #{placeholder}, required = #{required}, options = #{options, typeHandler=net.sosyge.formflow.mybatis.handler.JsonListTypeHandler}, validation = #{validation, typeHandler=net.sosyge.formflow.mybatis.handler.JsonMapTypeHandler} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE form_fields SET order_num = #{orderNum} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM form_fields WHERE id = #{id} AND form_id = #{formId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM form_fields WHERE form_id = #{formId}
SELECT MAX(order_num) FROM form_fields WHERE form_id = #{formId}
